name: Omon.hfdsSouth30
title: Downward Heat Flux at Sea Water Surface
description: This is the net flux of heat entering the liquid water column through its upper surface (excluding any "flux adjustment") .
processing note:
Report on native horizontal grid as well as remapped onto a latitude/longitude grid.
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of Omon.hfdsSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
